data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a 2-hour acceptance time for waitlist offers. However, the evidence provided does not include any information regarding the actual time frame for acceptance or whether the offer was made to the customer. The absence of this critical information indicates a gap in the validation process, as the requirement cannot be confirmed without evidence of the acceptance time being tracked or enforced.
gaps: No evidence of the time frame for accepting the waitlist offer.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
